rationale: Both candidates independently found the key latent gap (the unswept get_cache_scale caller in hunyuan_image3_transformer.py), satisfying gap_hit, but Y ties it directly to the PR's own listed affected files and notes it was later fixed referencing this PR, giving stronger grounding. Y also independently surfaces the same substantive weakness the human reviewer raised (the delegated-loader test doesn't actually validate the outer AutoWeightsLoader's mapping behavior), whereas X explicitly cites that same test as having 'validated' correctness, missing the human's core non-blocking concern. X pads its output with three near-duplicate low-value 'add a comment' nits, diluting precision/actionability relative to Y's more surgical, higher-value findings.
